package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
	"strings"
)

// scenario for header_injection_via_user_input: `w.Header().Set(name, userInput)` or `w.Header().Add(name, userInput)` where the value contains unvalidated user input that could contain `\r\n`
// fixture polarity: negative; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario717Negative(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	value := strings.Map(func(ch rune) rune { if ch == '\r' || ch == '\n' { return -1 }; return ch }, r.FormValue("name"))
	w.Header().Set("X-Display-Name", value)
}
